---
title: "Featured Research"
description: "Selected research from the Cancer Data Science Laboratory"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

<!-- Generated from rows checked `featured` in content/outputs/publications-control.json. -->
::: {.featured-research-page .highlights-doi-page}
<header class="featured-intro">
<p class="eyebrow">Signature works</p>
<h1>Computational ideas behind major cancer discoveries.</h1>
<p>A selection of studies chosen by the laboratory. Their order follows the publication control sheet.</p>
</header>

<section class="highlight-category highlight-category-2 highlight-category-single">
<div class="highlight-grid"><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">bioRxiv</p><span class="highlight-year">2026</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.06.09.731105" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Tumour evolution as ground truth for cancer whole-genome sequencing</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.64898/2026.06.09.731105</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">bioRxiv</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.03.31.646456" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Timing and clustering co-occurring genome amplifications in cancers</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1101/2025.03.31.646456</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Genome Biology</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-025-03530-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">MIDAA: deep archetypal analysis for interpretable multi-omic data integration based on biological principles</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1186/s13059-025-03530-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Genome Biology</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-025-03835-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">BASCULE: bayesian inference and clustering of mutational signatures leveraging biological priors</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1186/s13059-025-03835-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Genome Biology</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-024-03170-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Computational validation of clonal and subclonal copy number alterations from bulk tumor sequencing using CNAqc</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1186/s13059-024-03170-5</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Communications</p><span class="highlight-year">2026</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-74451-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Scalable, fast and accurate differential gene expression testing from millions of cells of multiple patients</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41467-026-74451-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Communications</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-44158-2" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Clinical application of tumour-in-normal contamination assessment from whole genome sequencing</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41467-023-44158-2</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Annals of Oncology</p><span class="highlight-year">2023</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.annonc.2022.12.002" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Clonal KEAP1 mutations with loss of heterozygosity share reduced immunotherapy efficacy and low immune cell infiltration in lung adenocarcinoma</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1016/j.annonc.2022.12.002</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">bioRxiv</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.12.28.630600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">A high-throughput 3D culture microfluidic platform for multi-parameter phenotypic and omics profiling of patient-derived organoids</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1101/2024.12.28.630600</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Cancer discovery</p><span class="highlight-year">2026</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/2159-8290.cd-24-0813" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Negative selection maintains grossly altered but broadly stable karyotypes in metastatic colorectal cancer</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1158/2159-8290.cd-24-0813</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Cancer Research</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/0008-5472.can-25-0999" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Epigenetic Heritability of Cell Plasticity Drives Cancer Drug Resistance through a One-to-Many Genotype-to-Phenotype Paradigm</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1158/0008-5472.can-25-0999</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Cancer Research</p><span class="highlight-year">2023</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1538-7445.am2023-4539" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Tumor evolution and immune microenvironment dynamics define response to neoadjuvant treatment of esophageal adenocarcinoma</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1158/1538-7445.am2023-4539</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Clinical Cancer Research</p><span class="highlight-year">2026</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1078-0432.ccr-26-0924" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Clinical significance of EGFR amplification in patients with EGFR-mutated metastatic non-small cell lung cancer receiving first-line osimertinib</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1158/1078-0432.ccr-26-0924</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Clinical Cancer Research</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1078-0432.ccr-24-0626" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Transcriptional Phenocopies of Deleterious KEAP1 Mutations Correlate with Survival Outcomes in Lung Cancer Treated with Immunotherapy</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1158/1078-0432.ccr-24-0626</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-024-07747-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The genomic landscape of 2,023 colorectal cancers</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41586-024-07747-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-024-08250-x" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Long-term lineage commitment in haematopoietic stem cell gene therapy</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41586-024-08250-x</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Biotechnology</p><span class="highlight-year">2022</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-021-01031-1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Chromatin Velocity reveals epigenetic dynamics by single-cell profiling of heterochromatin and euchromatin</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41587-021-01031-1</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Cancer</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s43018-025-00955-w" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Evolutionary and immune microenvironment dynamics during neoadjuvant treatment of esophageal adenocarcinoma</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s43018-025-00955-w</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature communications</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-59156-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Genomic landscape of diffuse glioma revealed by whole genome sequencing</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41467-025-59156-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature communications</p><span class="highlight-year">2025</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-54728-7" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Early tolerance and late persistence as alternative drug responses in cancer</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41467-024-54728-7</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Communications</p><span class="highlight-year">2023</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-39313-8" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Cancer genomes tolerate deleterious coding mutations through somatic copy number amplifications of wild-type regions</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41467-023-39313-8</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Genetics</p><span class="highlight-year">2024</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41588-024-01777-9" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Homopolymer switches mediate adaptive mutability in mismatch repair-deficient colorectal cancer</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41588-024-01777-9</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Genetics</p><span class="highlight-year">2020</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41588-020-0675-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Subclonal reconstruction of tumors by using machine learning and population genetics</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41588-020-0675-5</p></article><article class="highlight-paper"><p class="highlight-journal">Nature Methods</p><span class="highlight-year">2018</span><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-018-0108-x" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Detecting repeated cancer evolution from multi-region tumor sequencing data</a></h3><p class="highlight-doi">10.1038/s41592-018-0108-x</p></article></div>
</section>

<section class="featured-all">
<p class="eyebrow">Complete record</p>
<h2>Explore every publication.</h2>
<a class="button button-dark" href="publications.html">View all publications</a>
</section>
:::
